**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Snowsen Auto Design Co., Ltd. is a 'two-person auto interior design studio and equipment proxy shell' mindlessly elevated to an 'auto parts manufacturing plant' by the official system. The forensic engine has completely cleared the underlying fake consumer electronics OEM data triggered by Apple Inc. The official commercial system, simply because its name contains 'Auto' and its business scope includes words like 'auto interior' and 'engine,' hastily slapped it with the heavy-asset tag of 'Automotive Manufacturing - Auto Parts and Accessories Manufacturing.' However, the physical probe and common-sense engine immediately executed a comprehensive demotion strike: this is a micro-enterprise established in 2010, its paid-in capital is only 500,000 RMB, and its 2024 insured headcount is only '2 people'! The most fatal blow comes from its registered coordinates: 'Room 613, Building A2, Huizhi Technology Park, No. 8 Hengtai Road, Nanjing Economic and Technological Development Zone.' On the 6th floor of a tech industrial park office (Room 613), relying on 2 employees to set up a heavy industry assembly line to manufacture car engines or car seats? This not only violates physical common sense but also completely ignores the tech park's 'asset-light office' industrial positioning. Reviewing its extremely clear true business license: the core business is the 'design, information consulting, and technical services' of auto interiors and seats, without any words indicating 'production or manufacturing.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not an auto parts manufacturing plant; it is a Two-Person Auto Design Studio & Equipment Proxy hidden on the 6th floor of a tech park. The boss (Dai Yang) is highly likely an auto interior design engineer, taking on some design outsourcing jobs from OEMs; simultaneously utilizing this tech shell to concurrently do some 'teaching equipment and laboratory equipment' proxy trading to earn the price difference.
